nodes.title: List Custom Screens
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/custom-screens with Authorization header. Returns array of custom screens with {id, name, description, tabs: [{id, name, type, config}]}.

nodes.title: Create Custom Screen
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/custom-screens with {name, description?, tabs: [{name, type, config}]}. Creates screen with multiple tabs. Returns created screen with tab IDs.

nodes.title: Update Custom Screen
nodes.description: PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/custom-screens/:id with {name?, description?, tabs?[]}. Updates screen and its tabs. Returns updated screen.

nodes.title: Delete Custom Screen
nodes.description: DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/custom-screens/:id. Removes screen and all its tabs. Returns 200 with {message: 'تم الحذف'}.

nodes.title: Get Screen Config
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/screens/:screenId/collection-style-config with Authorization header. Returns screen-specific configuration including layout style, visible columns, and widget settings.

nodes.title: Save Screen Config
nodes.description: PUT /api/businesses/:bizId/screens/:screenId/collection-style-config with {layout, columns[], widgets[]}. Saves or updates screen-specific configuration. Returns saved config.
